answers: Python is a beginner-friendly programming language known for clean syntax. Used in web dev, data science, AI, automation, and scripting.
Learn Python: start with variables, loops, functions, then move to OOP, file handling, and libraries like requests, pandas, flask.
Best Python resources: official docs (docs.python.org), Automate the Boring Stuff (free), Codecademy, and YouTube channels like Corey Schafer.
Python syntax is simple — no semicolons, no curly braces, just indentation. print('Hello World') is all you need to start!
